c1.descriptionRaw: When the Herald of Frost hits an opponent marked by a Fortune-Preserving Talisman, Qiqi regenerates 2 Energy.
c1.name: Ascetics of Frost

c2.descriptionRaw: Qiqi's Normal and Charged Attack DMG against opponents affected by <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo</color> is increased by 15%.
c2.name: Frozen to the Bone

c3.descriptionRaw:
Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Adeptus Art: Preserver of Fortune</color> by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.
c3.name: Ascendant Praise

c4.descriptionRaw: Targets marked by the Fortune-Preserving Talisman have their ATK decreased by 20%.
c4.name: Divine Suppression

c5.descriptionRaw:
Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Adeptus Art: Herald of Frost</color> by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.
c5.name: Crimson Lotus Bloom

c6.descriptionRaw:
Using <color=#FFD780FF>Adeptus Art: Preserver of Fortune</color> revives all fallen party members nearby and regenerates 50% of their HP.
This effect can only occur once every 15 mins.
c6.name: Rite of Resurrection

profile.description: An apprentice and herb gatherer at Bubu Pharmacy. An undead with a bone-white complexion, she seldom has much in the way of words or emotion.
profile.name: Qiqi
profile.title: Icy Resurrection

combat1.descriptionRaw:
<color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>
Performs up to 5 rapid strikes.

<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>
Consumes a certain amount of Stamina to unleash 2 rapid sword strikes.

<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>
Plunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact.
combat1.name: Ancient Sword Art

labels: Herald of Frost Coordinated Attack DMG|{param9:F1P}
Herald of Frost Coordinated Attack CD|{param10:F1}s

combat2.descriptionRaw: Using the Icevein Talisman, Qiqi brings forth the Herald of Frost, dealing Cryo DMG to surrounding opponents. Herald of Frost ·On hit, Qiqi's Normal and Charged Attacks regenerate HP for your own party members and nearby teammates. Healing scales based on Qiqi's ATK. ·Periodically regenerates your active character's HP. ·Follows the character around, dealing Cryo DMG to opponents in their path. I use this to prevent warming and rot... of Dr. Bai's precious ingredients. Yes.
combat2.name: Adeptus Art: Herald of Frost

combat3.descriptionRaw: Qiqi releases the adeptus power sealed within her body, marking nearby opponents with a Fortune-Preserving Talisman that deals Cryo DMG. Fortune-Preserving Talisman When opponents affected by this Talisman take DMG, the character that dealt this DMG regenerates HP. "I am the Fortune Preserver, the Maiden of Resurrection." — Qiqi does not remember these words.
combat3.name: Adeptus Art: Preserver of Fortune

passive1.descriptionRaw: When a character under the effects of <color=#FFD780FF>Adeptus Art: Herald of Frost</color> triggers an Elemental Reaction, their Incoming Healing Bonus is increased by 20% for 8s.
passive1.name: Life-Prolonging Methods

passive2.descriptionRaw: When Qiqi hits opponents with her Normal and Charged Attacks, she has a 50% chance to apply a Fortune-Preserving Talisman to them for 6s. This effect can only occur once every 30s.
passive2.name: A Glimpse Into Arcanum

passive3.descriptionRaw: Displays the location of nearby <color=#FFD780FF>resources unique to Liyue</color> on the mini-map.
passive3.name: Former Life Memories

passive4.descriptionRaw:
The cooldown of the Elemental Skill <color=#FFD780FF>Adeptus Art: Herald of Frost</color> is reduced to 15s.
<color=#FFD780FF>Radiance: Stellar-Conduct</color>: While the Herald of Frost is on the field, characters in Qiqi's party have their Superconduct and Stellar-Conduct Reaction DMG increased by 50%.
Additionally, when inside a {LINK#N11330003}<color=#FFD780FF>Polestar Field</color>{/LINK}, Qiqi will enter the <color=#FFD780FF>Radiance: Stellar-Conduct</color> state.
passive4.name: Seven Sacred Treasures
